_comment: Mutation testing — scoped to the pure logic: the shared domain core (shared/src/lib + shared/src/domain, 'the product') plus the pure .ts helpers behind the schedule (src/components/scheduler, src/lib). Answers 'do the unit tests actually BITE?' (kill mutants) rather than just 'did they run the lines?' (coverage). Deliberately NOT wired into the gate (runs take many minutes); run on demand with `npm run mutation` before releases or after core changes. Report lands in reports/mutation/mutation.html.
